title: Wealth management client quarterly review prep
pain_description: Each client needs a quarterly portfolio review with personalized commentary — markets, performance, tax events, life changes. Advisor spends 2-3 hrs/client per quarter on prep; 600+ hrs/yr just on reviews.
incumbent_gap: Portfolio data yes; LLM narrative + personalization weak
santifer_pattern: Portfolio data + client context + LLM commentary agent

title: RIA compliance book updates per SEC/FINRA
pain_description: Annual Form ADV updates, 13F filings, Reg BI disclosures, advertising review — compliance manual updates are weeks of work; fines for drift.
santifer_pattern: Reg feed + policy diff + compliance manual agent

title: 401(k) plan advisor ops for small-plan market
pain_description: Form 5500 filings, ADP/ACP testing, plan documents — 100+ small plans × annual cycles = heavy admin.
santifer_pattern: Plan data + IRS rule engine + 5500 generator

title: Insurance reinsurance cession + treaty admin
pain_description: Quota share + excess of loss treaties with 10+ reinsurers; cession calcs monthly; disputes on sliding-scale commissions; Excel spaghetti.
santifer_pattern: Treaty terms + cession engine + variance explainer

title: Credit union loan servicing + member comms
pain_description: Thousands of loan members; dunning manual; skip-pay requests backlog; younger members demand digital.
santifer_pattern: Member SSOT + LLM comms agent + skip-pay flow

title: Community bank exception handling (wires, ACH holds)
pain_description: Daily exception queues: wire holds, ACH NOCs, returned items, check fraud — each pulls ops hours.
santifer_pattern: Exception feed + LLM classifier + resolution agent

title: Trust + estate administration coordination
persona: Trust officer at bank / independent trust co
pain_description: Each trust: annual tax return, beneficiary reporting, investment oversight, distribution requests — paper-heavy, manual.
santifer_pattern: Trust SSOT + calendar + doc generator + beneficiary comms

title: Broker-dealer OSJ supervisory review
pain_description: Principal reviews all reg-sub rep trades + communications + outside business activity; FINRA audits merciless.
santifer_pattern: Trade + comm feed + LLM principal-review drafter

title: Merchant underwriting at payment facilitators
pain_description: Every new sub-merchant needs underwriting within hours; volume explodes, humans can't keep up; high-risk industries slip through.
santifer_pattern: Merchant data + LLM risk narrative + tier recommender

title: Asset manager holdings-based attribution
pain_description: Monthly attribution reports explain fund performance vs benchmark; quant + narrative; days of work per fund.
santifer_pattern: Holdings + perf data + LLM attribution narrator

title: Hedge fund investor letter writing
pain_description: Monthly/quarterly LP letters — performance + market commentary + portfolio positioning — blank-page dread every cycle.
santifer_pattern: Fund data + past letters + LLM drafter

title: Private equity portfolio monthly KPI pull
pain_description: 20 portcos each send monthly KPI flash; formats differ; normalization manual; board deck slips.
santifer_pattern: Portco template + LLM normalizer + board-pack generator

title: VC fund administration: capital calls + distributions
pain_description: Capital call notices, side letters, K-1s, distribution waterfalls — spreadsheet + email chain across hundreds of LPs.
santifer_pattern: Fund doc + LP DB + automated notices + waterfall calc

title: Family office: multi-asset consolidated reporting
pain_description: Public + private + real estate + collectibles + operating businesses; no single source of truth; quarterly consolidation 2 weeks.
santifer_pattern: Multi-custodian + LLM reconciler + family-specific narrative

title: Venture debt covenant monitoring
pain_description: Monthly/quarterly covenant packages from portfolio cos; revenue covenant + liquidity + reporting compliance — manual review.
santifer_pattern: Cov package intake + LLM compliance checker + alert

title: SBA 7(a) loan application completeness review
pain_description: 7(a) apps have 60+ docs; underwriter time-bound; missing docs delay; borrower drops out.
santifer_pattern: App intake + checklist agent + borrower chaser

title: Commercial real estate underwriting memo
pain_description: Each deal: rent roll + operating statements + market comps + sponsor experience — 30-page memo per loan; weeks per deal.
santifer_pattern: Deal doc ingest + LLM memo drafter + risk flag

title: Consumer lending: underwrite alt-data for thin-file
pain_description: Thin-file borrowers (new immigrants, young) lack credit bureau; bank-transaction + rent/utility data exists but messy.
santifer_pattern: Bank feed + LLM cash-flow underwriter + policy engine

title: Auto lender collections + repossession orchestration
pain_description: Delinquent borrowers; right-party contact <40%; repo + title work tedious; CFPB rules strict.
santifer_pattern: Borrower CRM + voice collection + repo workflow

title: BNPL dispute + chargeback handling
pain_description: Customers dispute transactions with merchant+BNPL in loop; cycle long; CS burns.
santifer_pattern: Dispute intake + merchant comms + LLM adjudicator

title: Commercial real estate asset mgmt: tenant comms + renewals
pain_description: Office/industrial leases renewing; tenant rep negotiations; CAM reconciliations; spreadsheet ops.
santifer_pattern: Lease SSOT + renewal agent + CAM calc

title: Municipal bond issuer disclosure (EMMA)
pain_description: Continuing disclosure obligations on EMMA; annual + event-driven; misses trigger SEC enforcement.
santifer_pattern: Calendar + template + EMMA filer agent

title: Treasury FX hedging program management
pain_description: Global exposures + hedge ratios + MTM accounting + bank confirms — Excel is the system.
santifer_pattern: Exposure + policy + hedge agent + accounting

title: Structured product + syndicate desk workflow
pain_description: New-issue pricing + allocation + term-sheet + IPA + marketing — spans multiple systems per deal.
santifer_pattern: Deal SSOT + LLM term-sheet + allocation agent

title: Private credit: portfolio monitoring (200+ borrowers)
pain_description: Each borrower sends monthly financials + compliance cert; PM reviews covenants manually; workouts blindside.
santifer_pattern: Borrower pack + LLM compliance + early-warning

title: Life insurance underwriting evidence-of-insurability
pain_description: APS (attending physician statement) ordering + review; blood labs; MIB checks — weeks per policy.
santifer_pattern: Applicant data + APS parse + LLM risk memo

title: Annuity surrender + income-rider calculations
pain_description: Riders byzantine; surrender charges per anniversary; client-service calls long; errors = lawsuits.
santifer_pattern: Policy + riders + LLM calc explainer

title: Captive insurance reporting + tax
pain_description: Domicile filings + IRS 831(b) + actuarial reviews; smaller captives burn fees.
santifer_pattern: Captive data + rule + filing drafter

title: Securities lending: loan rates + recall
pain_description: Rates change intraday; recalls negotiated by phone; counterparty exposure manual.
santifer_pattern: Rate + availability + counterparty DB + agent

title: Client tax letters + 1099 package season
pain_description: Every client wants their tax package + personalized letter by March 15; 100+ clients = panic.
santifer_pattern: Client data + LLM letter + tax doc pack

title: ETF issuer: basket construction + creation/redemption
pain_description: Daily basket + AP interaction + rebalance; errors cost bps; small issuers especially.
santifer_pattern: Holdings + AP comms + exception agent

title: Alternative investment LP statements quarterly
pain_description: Each GP sends quarterly cap account statement — different formats; analyst re-keys into LP system.
santifer_pattern: Statement OCR + LLM extractor + LP system push

title: Crypto tax + cost-basis reconciliation
pain_description: Wallets + exchanges + DeFi + NFTs = 1000s of txns; cost basis chaos; IRS Form 8949 a nightmare.
santifer_pattern: On-chain + CEX + LLM basis reconciler

title: High-net-worth philanthropy + DAF admin
pain_description: Grant recommendations + charity due diligence + impact reporting — manual per donor.
santifer_pattern: Grant intake + charity DB + impact report generator

title: Fintech customer AML KYC periodic refresh
pain_description: Existing customers need KYC refresh every 1-3 years; 10K+ refreshes/month manual.
incumbent_gap: New KYC good; refresh workflow thin
santifer_pattern: Refresh queue + auto-request + LLM review + escalation

title: Insurance agency: new-business quote comparison
pain_description: Customer wants 3-5 carrier quotes; broker manually re-enters ACORD across carriers; quote-to-bind slow.
santifer_pattern: ACORD intake + multi-carrier API + LLM compare

title: Annuity + life producer licensing compliance
pain_description: State appointments + CE credits + disciplinary history across 1000+ producers.
santifer_pattern: Producer DB + state rule + CE agent + alerts

title: Reinsurance claims: catastrophe event aggregation
pain_description: Hurricane / quake / wildfire: 1000s of claims per carrier; aggregation to reinsurance layers manual.
santifer_pattern: Claims feed + layer attachment + LLM narrative

title: Corporate earnings + 10-Q/10-K drafting
pain_description: Quarterly 10-Q + MD&A drafting + XBRL tagging; weeks of senior time.
santifer_pattern: Financial data + prior doc + LLM MD&A drafter

title: Insurance MGA submission pipeline triage
pain_description: Email submissions from retail brokers; MGA underwrites for carriers; response SLA kills deals.
santifer_pattern: Email + ACORD OCR + LLM clearing

title: Insurance loss run analysis for renewals
pain_description: Loss runs arrive as PDFs from 3-5 prior carriers; manual normalization + loss-ratio calc.
santifer_pattern: PDF intake + OCR + LLM normalizer + UW memo

title: Lloyd's syndicate bordereaux processing
pain_description: Quarterly bordereaux from MGAs/coverholders; formats vary wildly; syndicates re-key.
santifer_pattern: Bordereaux intake + LLM normalizer + loss aggregator

title: Workers comp loss sensitive premium audit
pain_description: Post-policy audit reconciles actual payroll vs. estimate; field auditor time-consuming; disputes long.
santifer_pattern: Payroll feed + classification rule + LLM audit report

title: Commercial lines endorsement processing
pain_description: Mid-term policy changes (new vehicle, location, driver) — each needs rating + doc + billing adjustment.
santifer_pattern: Endorsement intake + rule engine + doc gen

title: Insurance broker reconciliation: commissions from carriers
pain_description: Carriers remit monthly commission statements; formats differ; broker re-keys + disputes.
santifer_pattern: Stmt intake + LLM normalizer + policy match + dispute

title: Claims examiner: medical record request + review
pain_description: Medical records requests delay claims 30+ days; reviewing 100s of pages per case.
santifer_pattern: Request agent + page ingest + LLM summary

title: Broker dealer: trade break investigation
pain_description: Trades don't match between execution + clearing + custody; break investigations by phone.
santifer_pattern: Trade data + break classifier + counterparty comms

title: Private company 409A valuation annual
pain_description: Each fundraise + annual = 409A; $3-10K per valuation; data gather painful.
santifer_pattern: Cap table + financials + LLM valuation report

title: Impact + ESG fund reporting (SFDR Articles 8/9)
pain_description: SFDR PAI metrics across 100+ holdings; data vendors incomplete; narrative manual.
santifer_pattern: Holdings + ESG data + LLM SFDR-template drafter

title: Trust + estate digital asset administration (crypto/NFT)
pain_description: Decedent held crypto/NFTs; private keys + wallets + exchanges; beneficiaries don't know what exists.
santifer_pattern: Wallet discovery + beneficiary workflow + tax prep
